# Copilot Project Instructions

This project uses a structured multi-agent development workflow.

## Agents

The project includes specialized agents located in `.github/agents`.

Agents roles:

- Orchestrator → coordinates development workflow
- Architect → designs system architecture
- Product Manager → defines features and roadmap
- Developer → implements code
- Debugger → analyzes and fixes errors
- Reviewer → ensures code quality
- Security → checks vulnerabilities
- Test Engineer → generates automated tests
- Performance → optimizes performance
- DevOps → manages deployment and infrastructure
- Data AI → handles machine learning and data workflows
- Documentation → writes technical documentation

## Development workflow

Typical workflow order:

1. Product Manager defines requirements
2. Architect designs the system
3. Developer implements features
4. Debugger resolves issues
5. Reviewer ensures quality
6. Security checks vulnerabilities
7. Test Engineer generates tests
8. Performance optimizes execution
9. DevOps prepares deployment
10. Documentation writes guides

## Coding principles

- Prefer modular architecture
- Use clear and maintainable code
- Document important decisions
- Ensure security best practices
- Write tests for critical logic
